sourceRef: tip:Handling a late-term credit change cleanly

slides.headline: Clean Up Late-Term Credit Changes
slides.body: Ensure compliance when a student drops after certification.

slides.headline: Review Course Eligibility
slides.body: Check if the student's course is eligible for VA education benefits.

slides.headline: Determine Credit Status
slides.body: Identify the credit status and the term in which the student dropped.
bullets: Consult with the student's academic advisor

slides.headline: Document Reasons
slides.body: Record the reason for the student's withdrawal and any relevant details.
bullets: Use the VA's official form: VA Form 22-1999

slides.headline: Submit Documentation
slides.body: Submit the documented reasons to the VA for review.
bullets: Ensure all forms are signed and dated

slides.headline: Monitor Decision
slides.body: Wait for VA's decision on your request and update the student's record accordingly.
Continue learning with VASCO Assistant Pro.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Master the two-step recovery when a student drops after certification. Review course eligibility, determine credit status, document reasons, submit documentation, and monitor the VA's decision. Stay compliant with VA education benefits. Link in bio for more tips.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, as it could benefit from a more concise headline to better capture the essence of the process.
